description: Create and deploy a channel named 'Heartbeat_Monitor' that generates synthetic HL7 v2.5 ADT^A01 heartbeat messages every 15 seconds. The messages must contain 'HEARTBEAT_MONITOR' as the MSH Sending Application and 'HEARTBEAT001' as the PID Patient ID. Save the output as unique files to /opt/heartbeat_output/. Ensure the channel is active and produces at least two files. Access the system via the NextGen Connect Administrator at http://localhost:8080 or the REST API at https://localhost:8443/api (admin/admin).
